arts.ttl: Arsenal shock! Wonderkid makes surprise transfer decision
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder Hugo Larsson has extended his contract completely out of the blue. Larsson joined Frankfurt in the summer of 2023 in what was seen as a real coup by the Bundesliga side as he previously had the chance to complete a dream move to his favourite club Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale moved to tears by warm reception from Arsenal supporters after making return to the Emirates for the first time since joining Southampton
arts.sum: The goalkeeper joined the Saints on a permanent £25million deal during the summer, bringing his three-year stay in north London to an end.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams remains coy on future amid Barcelona, Arsenal and Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Nico Williams has insisted he's 'happy' at Atletico Club after snubbing interest from Barcelona, Chelsea and Arsenal during the summer transfer window. “I’m happy in Bilbao, I’ve decided to stay here," said Williams.

arts.ttl: 'I feel very happy': £30m ace is delighted to have left Arsenal, decision to depart justified already
arts.sum: He fell out of favour under Mikel Arteta...

arts.ttl: Arsenal team news: Mikel Arteta makes three changes including huge Raheem Sterling call
arts.sum: Arsenal attacker Raheem Sterling makes his first Premier League start for the Gunners in their clash with Southampton, while Thomas Partey plays at right-back.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Southampton - Premier League 3pms: Live score, team news and latest updates as Mikel Arteta's side host the Saints with Man City, Wolves and West Ham also in action
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of all the 3pm Premier League fixtures to be kept up-to-date on all the action plus live score from the five games Arsenal vs Southampton and Man City vs Fulham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Southampton, Manchester City v Fulham and more: clockwatch – live
arts.sum: All the 3pm BST games in Premier League and beyond Live scoreboard | And email Rob with your thoughts Championship There are three early games, and these are the half-time scores. Burnley 0-0 Preston Norwich 2-0 Hull Portsmouth 0-0 Oxford Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale opens up on 'difficult' decision to leave Arsenal
arts.sum: Speaking to Sky Sports about his decision to leave the Emirates Stadium, Ramsdale revealed that he left the club in search of regular minutes in the Premier League: Since then, the goalkeeper has started four Premier League games for the Saints, just two starts shy of his total for the 2023/24 campaign at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gabriel Jesus offered January exit route?
arts.sum: One of Arsenal's attacker is reportedly offered the opportunity to re-sign for a former club during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Juventus reignite interest in Arsenal defender to replace injured Bremer
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Jakub Kiwior has become of interest to Juventus again following the long-term injury...
